Job description

Backend Developer Intern - Summer 2026 

Sorcea - Manhattan, NY (Remote)

About Us: As consumers, we're expected to make decisions for our health and confidence while being bombarded with information. This trial-and-error is hurting people's skin, and more importantly, their confidence.


On Sorcea, you can scan products and see personalized scores, based on whether they've worked for people like you… People your age, with your same skin type, who maybe even use the same products you do. It's 100% ad-free, always free for shoppers, and brands can never pay to change their scores.

We keep our platform ad-free by using our proprietary database to give brands feedback on how to serve their customers. Instead of focus groups and surveys, brands get real-time sentiment from granular customer segments, all while protecting our users’ personal information.

Internship Duration: Summer 2026

Position Type: Unpaid, Remote (possibility for in-person collaboration if in the NYC or Miami area)

Work Schedule: This internship is part-time and hours are flexible, we ask typically for a minimum of 10-15 hours a week. Furthermore, we do not have designated work times during the day, interns are able to work whenever is best as long as agreed upon hours are met.

Learning Opportunity: This internship is designed as a learning opportunity for students and young professionals seeking real-world experience in a small tech startup environment. You'll gain hands-on experience in back-end development, machine learning, optimization, data structures, and system controls within a growing e-commerce platform.

Who We're Looking For: We welcome applications from college students to professionals at all levels. The ideal candidate is self-driven, eager to learn, and confident in offering new ideas. We value individuals who are willing to adapt and grow with our evolving needs.

Minimum Qualifications:

Pursuing or have completed a BS in Computer Science, Data Science, or any technology-based degree relevant to the responsibilities of this role
At least 6 months of AWS experience

Preferred Skills:

Experience with AWS services, specifically S3, EC2, and/or DynamoDB
Experience with machine learning tools and optimization algorithms
Experience with building data infrastructure and data mining
Strong problem-solving abilities
Excellent communication skills
Ability to work independently and as part of a team

Primary Responsibilities:

Set up data structures for our platform
Design personalization features via machine learning
Implement system controls
Innovate and improve our data pipeline
Participate in projects that align with your skills and career ambitions
Offer suggestions and improvements to our existing systems
Learn and adapt to new technologies and methodologies as needed

What We Offer:

Direct mentorship from our CTO
Access to our full team for communication and learning opportunities
Exposure to various aspects of a tech startup, including technology development, business operations, and entrepreneurship
Opportunity to shape your role based on your interests and skills
Potential for part-time or full-time employment based on performance

To Apply: Please submit your resume, and any relevant portfolio or project examples demonstrating your skills that make you a good fit for this role.

Note: This is an unpaid internship opportunity. We are committed to providing a valuable learning experience and real-world exposure in exchange for your time and skills. Performance during the internship will be evaluated for potential continued employment opportunities.

Sorcea values diversity and encourages applicants from all backgrounds to apply. Please submit a resume even if you do not possess all the preferred skills listed above.

About the employer
Sorcea

Cleveland, OH

Sorcea was born in a Case Western dorm room out of a simple but powerful realization. Finding the correct products for your skin shouldn't be this hard. So, we decided to build Sorcea with one goal: to help you discover products, so you can feel your most confident every. single. day. Sorcea is hyper-personalized to you, understands your unique needs, and learns your preferences over time.
